title: Summarize Document for Chat — Output Schema (SUM-CHAT@v1)
description: Output schema for sprk_analysisaction sprk_actioncode='SUM-CHAT@v1'. R6 task 032 (D-B-03) — populates sprk_outputschemajson on the existing action row. The schema MIRRORS VERBATIM the schema baked into src/server/api/Sprk.Bff.Api/Services/Ai/Chat/Playbooks/summarize-document-for-chat.playbook.json (R5 D2-01 author surface) and the value currently stored on sprk_analysisaction id eeb05bfd-1260-f111-ab0b-70a8a59455f4 in Spaarke Dev. Property declaration order is LOAD-BEARING — Azure OpenAI Structured Outputs streams properties in declaration order (verified by R5 task 006 spike). tldr → summary → keywords → entities must remain in this exact order so the StructuredOutputStreamWidget can render the TL;DR section within ~300-500ms of stream start (spec FR-02 / R5 UX requirement).
$comment-property-order: DECLARATION ORDER IS LOAD-BEARING — see file-level $comment-schema-order. tldr first to satisfy R5 UX FR-02 TL;DR-first streaming requirement. Per task 006 spike, Azure OpenAI streams properties in this declaration order.

tldr.description: 1-3 concise bullet takeaways, each ≤140 chars. Emitted FIRST in the stream so the Workspace pane can populate the TL;DR section within ~300-500ms of stream start (spec FR-02).

summary.description: Multi-sentence narrative summary (≤2 paragraphs, ≤2000 chars). Emitted SECOND. References file names when distinguishing multi-file content.

keywords.description: Comma-separated keywords (5-15 terms) for search indexing + categorization. Emitted THIRD. NOTE: this is a STRING (not array) to match DocumentAnalysisResult.Keywords. Prefer concrete terms (party names, amounts, dates, contract types) over generic terms.

entities.description: Named entities. Emitted LAST. organizations + persons arrays may be empty when none are present.

organizations.description: Distinct organizations mentioned in the documents (deduplicated, canonical form).

persons.description: Distinct persons mentioned in the documents (deduplicated, canonical form).
